VS2-SEC-001.notes: No scenario-specific validator exists yet; blanket proof is not allowed.

VS2-SEC-002.notes: Synthetic Alice session derives tenant_alpha from membership; caller-forged tenant_beta/admin fields are rejected and audited.

VS2-SEC-003.notes: Missing, malformed, and expired synthetic sessions fail before DB or egress calls.

VS2-SEC-004.notes: No scenario-specific validator exists yet; blanket proof is not allowed.

VS2-SEC-005.notes: Synthetic membership revoke is observed by the next request and stale worker job is quarantined.

VS2-SEC-006.notes: No scenario-specific validator exists yet; blanket proof is not allowed.

VS2-SEC-007.notes: Disposable PostgreSQL 16 contains synthetic tenant_alpha and tenant_beta rows in every protected table; app-role tenant_alpha SELECT sees only tenant_alpha.

VS2-SEC-008.notes: Application role cannot insert/update into tenant_beta and cross-tenant update/delete return zero rows.

VS2-SEC-009.notes: No scenario-specific validator exists yet; blanket proof is not allowed.

VS2-SEC-011.notes: No scenario-specific validator exists yet; blanket proof is not allowed.

VS2-SEC-012.notes: No scenario-specific validator exists yet; blanket proof is not allowed.

VS2-SEC-013.notes: PostgreSQL role inventory proves application/migration/maintenance roles are not superuser/BYPASSRLS and protected tables force RLS.

VS2-SEC-014.notes: No scenario-specific validator exists yet; blanket proof is not allowed.

VS2-SEC-015.notes: No scenario-specific validator exists yet; blanket proof is not allowed.

VS2-SEC-016.notes: No scenario-specific validator exists yet; blanket proof is not allowed.

VS2-SEC-017.notes: Synthetic worker envelopes run only with trusted scope; missing, tampered, and stale jobs are quarantined before DB access.
